verify_skill_description: Validate example-domain contracts and data flow.

checks.name: Verify core symbol wiring
checks.pass_criteria: core symbols are declared and referenced

checks.name: Verify test coverage hook
checks.pass_criteria: critical behavior appears in test scenarios

exceptions: Generated fixture-only file changes are not failures.
Optional integrations can be skipped when explicitly disabled by config.
Environment-specific local paths are not part of PASS criteria.
